column1: # record_id           -> Unique record identifier for the threat event
# src_ip              -> Source IP address involved in the activity
# dst_ip              -> Destination IP observed in telemetry
# first_seen_epoch    -> First observed timestamp in epoch format
# last_seen_epoch     -> Last observed timestamp in epoch format (may be empty if still active)
# campaign            -> Associated malware campaign or threat actor
# context_details     -> Complex structured metadata (JSON-like string with host/user/process info)
# reviewed            -> Whether the IOC has been reviewed (true/false)
